synthesis: META is in a confirmed post-earnings bear regime after a -7.9% collapse on 3.34x volume (Apr 30). All swing agents agree on direction (bearish) but disagree on timing. The setup to short does NOT exist yet at current price ($611-612): entering short here produces <1:1 R/R vs the $643 stop, well below the 2:1 minimum rule. The trade plan is fully conditional on price bouncing to the $626-630 resistance cluster (Fib 38.2%, broken prior support) and printing a confirmed rejection candle (bearish engulfing or pin bar on hourly). When that condition is met, short ~$628, target $585 (Fib 61.8%), stop $643 for ~2.87:1 R/R. Max position size at risk manager limit of $613 (~0.97 shares, rounded to 1 share = $628 notional, well within limit and 25% cap of $1,052). If price instead breaks below $600 support on volume without a bounce, reassess for momentum continuation short below $597. Capital preserved for the conditional entry.
